name: feat-ESE-0015-07
title: Nested view scenario TV in scene
description: Create a working nested view demo: a camera renders to an offscreen texture, displayed on a RenderQuad in the main scene. The browser shows a 3D scene containing a TV quad that displays a live feed from another camera angle.
acceptanceCriteria:
- A camera renders to an offscreen RenderTarget texture
- A RenderQuad displays that texture in the main scene
- The browser camera sees the RenderQuad with the live feed
- Visual screenshot shows a scene containing a TV quad with a different camera view inside it
demoDeliverable: Screenshot showing a 3D scene with a RenderQuad displaying a live feed from another camera.
testingScenarios:
- Launch dev server, verify TV quad visible in the scene
- Verify TV quad shows a different camera angle than the main view
- Screenshot captured via Playwright
stakeholderUnderstanding: The nested TV scenario — demonstrates a view within a view, without yet going to the recursive extreme.
